onboarding.step1_desc: Your all-in-one mail & CRM. Manage emails, contacts, and deals in one place.
onboarding.step2_desc: Add Gmail, IMAP, or Outlook accounts. SMEMaster syncs your mail, labels, and folders automatically.
onboarding.step3_desc: Track clients, tag conversations, and never lose a lead. Your relationships, organized.
onboarding.step4_desc: Smart labels auto-categorize email. Compose faster with AI. Search intelligently across all your data.
onboarding.tip2: Drag emails to the sidebar to file them
onboarding.tip4: Campaigns help you reach many contacts at once
onboarding.feature1_desc: See your inbox, tasks, and pipeline at a glance
onboarding.feature2_desc: Auto-categorized email from all your accounts
onboarding.feature3_desc: Rich editor with templates, AI assist, and scheduling
onboarding.feature4_desc: Gmail, Outlook, IMAP — connect any email provider
onboarding.feature5_desc: OAuth 2.0, app passwords, and end-to-end encryption
onboarding.feature6_desc: Keep working even without internet connectivity
onboarding.feature7_desc: Tag, group, and segment your contacts easily
onboarding.feature8_desc: Visual deal stages with drag-and-drop Kanban
onboarding.feature9_desc: Find any email, contact, or file instantly
onboarding.feature10_desc: Smart compose, summarization, and reply suggestions

email.addAccountToStart: Add a Gmail account to get started
email.thisSenderAcceptsNoReplies: This sender does not accept replies
email.promotionsDescription: Marketing and promotional emails appear here
email.starEmailsToFind: Star emails to find them here
email.adjustSmartFolderQuery: Try adjusting the smart folder query

settings.surfaceGlassHint: Frosted glass orbs and blur for a richer look.
settings.reduceMotionDescription: Disable animated background effects (fixes flickering on some GPUs)
settings.highContrastDescription: Increase UI contrast for better readability and accessibility
settings.vipDescription: These senders always trigger notifications regardless of category
settings.workflowDescription: Create automated email workflows with triggers and actions
settings.syncChangesOnResync: Changes apply on the next full resync.
settings.noLogsFoundDescription: Try adjusting your filters or search query.
settings.vipNotifyDescription: Important contacts you never want to miss
settings.smartLabelDescription: Auto-label incoming emails based on AI rules
settings.labelSettingsTitle: Manage labels, filters, and smart organization
settings.addAccountToGetStarted: Add an email account to get started with SMEMaster.
settings.cleanupLogs: Clean up logs older than 7 days
settings.launchAtLoginDescription: Start SMEMaster automatically when you log in (minimized to tray)
settings.blockRemoteImagesDescription: Hides tracking pixels and remote images until you choose to load them
settings.phishingDetectionDescription: Scan message links for phishing indicators and show warnings
settings.biometricLockDescription: Lock the app with fingerprint or face unlock
settings.unlockWithBiometric: Unlock with fingerprint or face ID
settings.smartNotificationsDescription: Only notify for selected categories and VIP senders
settings.smartRepliesDescription: Suggest quick reply options for conversations
settings.askInboxDescription: Ask questions about your inbox and get AI-powered answers
settings.sendAndArchiveDescription: Automatically archive threads after sending a reply
settings.quickRepliesDescription: Quick replies are reusable message snippets you can insert with one click.
settings.labelsDescription: Create, rename, recolor, delete, or reorder your Gmail labels.
settings.filtersDescription: Filters automatically apply actions to new incoming emails during sync.
settings.smartLabelsDescription: Describe what emails should get a label using plain English. AI automatically labels matching emails during sync.
settings.smartFoldersDescription: Smart folders are saved searches that automatically show matching emails. Use search operators like is:unread, from:, has:attachment, after:.
settings.quickStepsDescription: Quick steps let you chain multiple actions together into a single click. Apply them from the right-click menu on any thread.
settings.workflowRulesDescription: Automate actions when specific email events occur. Create rules that trigger on incoming email, follow-up reminders, or time-based schedules.
settings.snoozePresetsDescription: Create custom snooze durations for quick access when deferring emails.

contentQuality.description: Analyze your email content for readability, clarity, and engagement
contentQuality.placeholder: Paste your email content here to analyze...

settings.contactsDescription: Contacts are automatically added when you send or receive emails. Edit display names or remove contacts below.
settings.subscriptionsDescription: View all detected newsletter and promotional senders. Unsubscribe using RFC 8058 one-click POST, mailto, or browser fallback.
settings.backgroundSyncDescription: Periodically sync email in the background
settings.providerDescription: Choose which AI provider to use for summarization, compose assistance, and smart categorization.
settings.providerLmstudioDescription: Connect to a local LM Studio server (OpenAI-compatible, no API key). Supports chat + embeddings for RAG.
settings.providerOpenrouterDescription: Route through OpenRouter for access to hundreds of models from one API key.
settings.lmstudioNoModels: No models found. Start a model in LM Studio first.
settings.usesModelCopilot: Uses {{model}}. Requires a GitHub PAT with models:read permission.
settings.providerOllamaDescription: Connect to a local Ollama or LMStudio server. No API key required.
settings.providerCustomDescription: Connect to any OpenAI-compatible API endpoint.
settings.connectionFailedCheckParams: Connection failed — check your URL, key, and model.
settings.enableAiFeaturesDescription: Master toggle for all AI functionality
settings.autoCategorizeDescription: Use AI to refine rule-based categorization
settings.autoSummarizeDescription: Show AI summaries on multi-message threads
settings.autoDraftRepliesDescription: Pre-populate the reply editor with an AI-generated draft
settings.learnWritingStyleDescription: Analyze your sent emails to match your tone and voice
settings.writingStyleProfileDescription: Reanalyze your writing style from recent sent emails
settings.categoriesDescription: Incoming emails are automatically sorted using rule-based heuristics (Gmail labels, sender domain, headers). When AI is enabled, it refines results for better accuracy.
settings.categoriesAutoArchiveDescription: Enable auto-archive to skip the inbox for specific categories.
settings.bundleDeliveryDescription: Collapse categories into a single row in the inbox. Optionally set a delivery schedule to batch emails.
settings.sendAsAliasesDescription: These aliases are synced from your Gmail settings. You can select which alias to use as the default sender.
settings.noAliasesFound: No aliases found. Aliases are fetched from Gmail on startup.
settings.pendingOperationsDescription: Changes waiting to sync to the server
settings.failedOperationsDescription: Changes that could not be synced after multiple retries
settings.openDevtoolsDescription: Open the WebView developer tools inspector
settings.appDescription: A fast, open-source desktop email client built with privacy in mind. Your emails stay on your machine — no cloud, no tracking.
settings.licenseText: Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0. You may obtain a copy of the License at

settings.quickComposeDescription: Open compose window from any app
settings.shortcutsDescription: Click a shortcut to rebind it. Press any key or key combination to set.
settings.iconNameHint: Search, MailOpen, Paperclip, Star, FolderSearch, Inbox, Clock, Tag

bounce.description: Track and manage email bounces for your campaigns.

blacklist.description: Check if your sending IP or domain is on any email blacklists.

warming.description: Gradually increase email sending volume to build sender reputation.
warming.notEnabled: Warming is not enabled for this account.

settings.conditionalBlocksDesc: Add conditional content blocks that show based on recipient data

dns.description: Check DNS records for your domain to ensure deliverability

settings.elseBlockPlaceholder: Content to show when condition is false
settings.noAccounts: No email accounts configured. Add an account to start warming.

presend.description: Run a pre-send checklist to catch common mistakes before sending

settings.monsterModeDescription: Show all advanced configuration options, Pro features, and experimental settings
settings.featureLocked: This feature is only available on the Pro plan
settings.upgradeToUnlock: Upgrade to Pro to unlock this feature
settings.testingOverridesDesc: When enabled, you can override the tier and usage counts per feature below to simulate different upgrade states.

tabDescriptions.composing: Configure email composition, signatures, templates, and sending behavior
tabDescriptions.general: Appearance, layout, language, and privacy settings
tabDescriptions.accounts: Manage email accounts, IMAP/SMTP settings, and CalDAV
tabDescriptions.deliverabilityDashboard: Domain health, DNS checks, and deliverability monitoring
tabDescriptions.ai: AI providers, smart replies, auto-categorization, and writing style
tabDescriptions.notifications: Email notifications, VIP senders, and category filters
tabDescriptions.compliance: GDPR, CAN-SPAM, and legal compliance profiles
tabDescriptions.pgp: PGP encryption keys and end-to-end security
tabDescriptions.mailRules: Labels, filters, smart folders, and quick steps
tabDescriptions.snooze: Snooze presets for delaying email visibility
tabDescriptions.content: Content quality analysis and readability scoring
tabDescriptions.dns: SPF, DKIM, DMARC, and DNS record verification
tabDescriptions.bounce: Bounce management and undelivered email tracking
tabDescriptions.workflows: Automated email workflows and trigger-based actions
tabDescriptions.featureFlags: Testing UI for Basic vs Pro feature flags, usage limits, and progressive disclosure
tabDescriptions.calendar: Manage calendars, default event settings, view preferences, and snooze presets

settings.deliverabilityDesc: Monitor domain health, DNS records, and overall deliverability.
settings.featureFlagTesterDesc: Toggle between Basic and Pro tiers and override usage counts to test progressive disclosure behavior.
